Bizarre Lineage Fighting Styles

Fighting Styles in Bizarre Lineage modify your base combat capabilities. Choose the right Bizarre Lineage fighting style and pair it with a specific Stand to unlock devastating combo potential and dominate PvP arenas.

Boxing

Reliable combos, high burst, close-range specialist. Great for extending M1 chains and maximizing damage output in close...

Combo 9/10
Damage 8/10
Range Close
Best with: WhitesnakeThe WorldStar Platinum

Kendo

Excellent range and counter-attacks. Synergizes with fast or sword-based Stands. Provides a mid-range option for players...

Combo 6/10
Damage 7/10
Range Mid
Best with: AnubisMade in HeavenC-Moon

Vampirism

Provides high sustain and ranged pressure through life steal and blood-based attacks. The best defensive fighting style,...

Combo 7/10
Damage 6/10
Range Mid
Best with: The WorldKiller QueenWhitesnake
